text: - 1.2 The  Subcontract  Documents  are  available  to  Subcontractor.  Contractor  will,  upon Subcontractor's reasonable request, furnish copies of the Subcontract Documents to Subcontractor, but Contractor may charge Subcontractor reasonable copy charges. Subcontractor  shall  make  applicable  portions  of  the  Subcontract  Documents  available  to  its proposed  Sub-subcontractors  (as  defined  below).  Subcontractor  acknowledges  that  it  has reviewed or had the opportunity to review the Subcontract Documents, and that it is bound by the Subcontract Documents. All of the provisions which comprise the Subcontract Documents shall be interpreted together and in harmony with one another. In case of conflict, however, the more stringent requirement shall control.
